title: Senior Radiologist at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services!
